name: auth-better-auth
title: Better Auth
description: Email and password authentication you own, stored in your Postgres via Drizzle

env.description: Random 32+ character secret used to sign sessions

postInstall: Generate a secret with: openssl rand -base64 32, then set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET in .env.local
Create the auth tables with: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:migrate

dataCollected: Account email and a securely hashed password
